# This directory contains cached results from SPARQL query execution
# 
# Structure:
#   cache/
#   ├── profiles/          # Profile-specific query caches
#   │   └── [ProfileName]/
#   │       └── [query-name].json
#   └── queries/           # Shared query caches
#       └── [query-name].json
#
# These caches are generated by the hydrate-caches.yml workflow and allow
# profiles to be loaded without executing live SPARQL queries against Wikidata.
#
# Cache files are JSON-formatted SPARQL query results following the standard
# SPARQL 1.1 Query Results JSON Format.
#
# Do not manually edit cache files. To refresh caches:
#   1. Trigger the "Hydrate SPARQL Caches" workflow manually, or
#   2. Wait for the scheduled weekly automatic refresh
